title: Udemy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Udemy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
